title: CANCELED – Planning Commission Meets July 25th. Here’s how to weigh in….
summary: The Regular Planning Commission, scheduled for July 25, 2023, at 7 P.M. was CANCELED due to lack of quorum, the agenda items will be postponed to the August 22nd, 2023 Regular Planning Commission. This hybrid meeting will be held in person and by remote participation. Join the virtual meeting online...

title: Training Opportunity: Improving Safety for Fisheries Observers
summary: Fisheries observers in the North Pacific play a vital role in the conservation and management of the Bering Sea, Aleutian Islands, and Gulf of Alaska groundfish and halibut fisheries.
